ValidationRule.description: if low season start and end year are the same, then low season start and end month cannot be same
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Rent_Type__c, 'Seasonal Rent'), AND(VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Year__c) == VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Year__c) , CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12) == CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Low season start and end month cannot be same
